title: Amadeus Flight Offer
description: A flight offer returned by the Amadeus Flight Offers Search API, representing a purchasable combination of flight segments with pricing for one or more travelers.

type.description: Resource type identifier for a flight offer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the flight offer within the search results.

source.description: Source of the flight offer data.

instantTicketingRequired.description: Whether the offer requires immediate ticketing upon booking.

nonHomogeneous.description: Whether the offer contains segments with different booking classes.

oneWay.description: Whether the offer is for a one-way trip.

lastTicketingDate.description: Last date by which the flight must be ticketed, in ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format.

lastTicketingDateTime.description: Last date and time by which the flight must be ticketed, in ISO 8601 format.

numberOfBookableSeats.description: Number of seats remaining available for booking on this offer.

itineraries.description: Array of itineraries composing the trip, each containing one or more flight segments.

price.description: Total price of the flight offer including all travelers.

pricingOptions.description: Pricing options and fare rules applicable to this offer.

validatingAirlineCodes.description: IATA codes of the airlines validating and issuing the tickets.

travelerPricings.description: Individual pricing breakdown for each traveler on the booking.

dictionaries.description: Reference dictionaries for codes used in the offer including carriers, aircraft, currencies, and locations.

carriers.description: Mapping of airline codes to airline names.

aircraft.description: Mapping of aircraft codes to aircraft names.

currencies.description: Mapping of currency codes to currency names.

locations.description: Mapping of location codes to location details.

Itinerary.description: A directional journey composed of one or more flight segments.

duration.description: Total duration of the itinerary in ISO 8601 duration format.

segments.description: Individual flight segments composing this itinerary.

Segment.description: A single flight leg between two airports.

carrierCode.description: Two-letter IATA airline code of the operating or marketing carrier.

number.description: Flight number assigned by the carrier.

operating.description: Operating carrier information when different from the marketing carrier.

carrierCode.description: IATA code of the operating airline.

duration.description: Duration of this flight segment in ISO 8601 format.

id.description: Unique identifier for this segment within the offer.

numberOfStops.description: Number of technical stops during this segment.

blacklistedInEU.description: Whether the operating carrier is on the EU blacklist.

FlightEndPoint.description: Departure or arrival point with airport code, terminal, and time.

iataCode.description: Three-letter IATA airport or city code.

terminal.description: Terminal name or number at the airport.

at.description: Local date and time of departure or arrival in ISO 8601 format.

Price.description: Pricing information for the flight offer.

total.description: Total price including taxes and fees.

base.description: Base fare amount before taxes and fees.

grandTotal.description: Final total price including all fees and surcharges.

additionalServices.description: Additional paid services included in the price.

PricingOptions.description: Options controlling how the fare was priced.

fareType.description: Types of fares included in the pricing.

includedCheckedBagsOnly.description: Whether the price includes only fares with checked baggage.

TravelerPricing.description: Pricing breakdown for an individual traveler.

travelerId.description: Identifier of the traveler this pricing applies to.

fareOption.description: Fare option selected for this traveler.

travelerType.description: Type of traveler for pricing category purposes.

fareDetailsBySegment.description: Fare details broken down by each flight segment.

segmentId.description: Reference to the segment this fare applies to.

fareBasis.description: Fare basis code indicating the fare rules.

brandedFare.description: Name of the branded fare if applicable.

includedCheckedBags.description: Checked baggage allowance for this segment.
